work_unit: SZ-BG-M-003: O(n²) base64 string concat in compressFallback + preprocessForVL
situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 derived fix. vision-adapter.ts compressFallback (line 345-347) and preprocessForVL (line 320-322) both use `let binary=''; for(...) binary+=String.fromCharCode(bytes[i])` to build base64 from Uint8Array — O(n²) string concatenation identical to already-fixed SZ-BG-H-002 blobToBase64 pattern. For large compressed JPEG outputs (~500KB+), this causes severe perf degradation in service worker.
action: Added uint8ArrayToBase64() helper using chunked String.fromCharCode.apply (8192-byte chunks) + btoa, replacing both O(n²) loops. Same approach as SZ-BG-H-002 fix. Tests pass (6/6 preprocess.test.ts). Type-check clean (no new errors in vision-adapter.ts).
outcome_evidence: Commit d553eb1 on auto/opt-background-1783213292 pushed to origin. vitest tests/preprocess.test.ts 6/6 passed. tsc --noEmit shows no new errors in vision-adapter.ts (pre-existing storage.ts:93 error unrelated).
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: SZ-BG-M-005 (mergeMultiSourceResults lacks skipFuzzy perf guard — O(n²) editDistance). Then SZ-BG-M-006 (extractJson may extract wrong JSON substring).

audit_findings.finding: preprocessForVL uses O(n²) string concatenation loop to build base64 from Uint8Array after canvas convertToBlob
audit_findings.remediation: Replace with chunked uint8ArrayToBase64 helper using String.fromCharCode.apply in 8192-byte chunks

audit_findings.finding: compressFallback uses identical O(n²) string concatenation loop for base64 encoding
